title: The I Ching and Philip K. Dick's The Man in the High Castle
author: Paul Mountfort
card_summary: A scholarly article from Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 43, No. 2, 2016) examining Dick's use of the I Ching in writing and structuring The Man in the High Castle. Mountfort explores how the ancient Chinese oracle functioned as both narrative device and compositional method. 24 pages.
